content:
The bell above the door chimed, a thin, silver sound that barely cut through the heavy humidity of the afternoon. I didn't look up immediately. I was busy with the glass case, polishing away a smudge that looked like a thumbprint but felt like a ghost. 

In the reflection, I saw her. Not the woman who had just walked in—a frantic thing in silk that cost more than my monthly rent—but the woman I ha
